nextAgentInstructions.warden: Review Sprints 3-5 code. Focus: (1) scorer.py — parallel gather with return_exceptions=True handles provider failures gracefully? (2) gate.routes.ts — findFirst+create pattern for approvals is race-condition safe? (3) sow.routes.ts — dual approval logic correct (both SOW_AM and SOW_DM)? (4) feedback-router.ts — fallback to PACKAGING_AGENT when no route matched? (5) version.routes.ts — isLatest flag correctly toggled on new version creation?
nextAgentInstructions.nova: Sprint 7 is next — full frontend. Read INTERFACE.md before writing any API calls. Key endpoints now available: /api/engagements (CRUD + message + feedback + advance-stage), /api/engagements/:id/gates/:gateNumber (submit/approve/override), /api/engagements/:id/sow (start/confirm/revise/approve), /api/engagements/:id/versions, /api/engagements/:id/artifacts/download, /api/engagements/:id/meetminds-reference. WebSocket events: job_started, job_completed, job_failed, gate_ready, gate_approved, gate_rejected, gate_reminder, artifact_ready, sow_section_ready, cascade_detected.
